_doc: Configuration for checks/check.mjs. denylist: retired facts that may never return in any scanned text file, add the OLD wording whenever a fact changes (see AGENTS.md conflict rule). Each entry: pattern (JS regex source, case-insensitive), why (shown on failure), optional exclude (path substrings to skip). docs/decisions/, archives and checks/ are never scanned by the denylist (decision records may quote retired wording). styleBans: AI-boilerplate phrases banned in all text (prose-style check, decision 0008); same shape as denylist, seeded with high-confidence tells, extend per project. The prose-style check also bans AI typography (em dash, en dash, ellipsis and curly quotes) with no config needed; escape a deliberate case with checks:allow-style on the line. extraTextExtensions/extraCodeExtensions: the stack skill adds this ecosystem's file types here. skipSymlinkCheck: set true only on Windows without symlink support.

styleBans.why: AI-tell verb; say 'look at', 'go into' or just state the point
marketing filler; describe what actually happens
filler throat-clearing; state the fact directly
filler; cut it or say what you mean
hype word; state the concrete effect
AI-tell flourish; say what it shows
hype phrasing; describe the capability plainly
